tags.expression:
CASE({[.]UPS_Output_Source_Raw},
    0,  "Normal",
    1,  "On Battery",
    2,  "SSW Bypass",
    3,  "UPS Off",
    4,  "UPS Self Test",
    5,  "Manual Bypass in Normal",
    6,  "Manual Bypass on Battery",
    7,  "Manual Bypass UPS Off",
    8,  "Manual Bypass on Static Bypass",
    "Unknown"
)
